data.body: FIXED + regression-tested (commit 19d3985d). Root cause confirmed via REAL bpmn-moddle: '@' arm ids are illegal NCNames -> parser drops the arm element -> branch loses then/else. Fix: '.'-separated valid ids + <rebar:Config _role> marker; reconstruct arms structurally (gateway flow + role), id-independent. Guards: faithful e2e (tests/e2e, drives real bpmn-moddle) + offline unit tests (no illegal NCName; arms survive simulated bpmn-js id rewrite). Full demo round-trips through the real serializer with 0 errors. Safe to close after Joe's editor review.
